cast.name: 努塔帕·坦迪斯汀柴 Nuttapart Tuntistinchai

this_title: ลูกพีชทานสด
introduction: The long-awaited return of "Peach Lover" the legendary owner of a hugely popular 18+ sensual account, after a year away from the spotlight, has sent hearts racing once again, especially for "Po" a devoted fan who has been hopelessly smitten for years. This time, Peach Lover comes back with a major announcement: the search for a brand-new "peach" , someone he meiju.ｐro can savor fresh, sweet, and juicy on camera. The die-hard fan doesn't hesitate for a second, submitting an application at lightning speed. At last, there's a chance to see the face of the person he's long dreamed of, even if only as a "bedmate" at work. But who would have thought... despite countless rehearsals between the sheets, they never actually step onto the real stage together. Instead, getting to know each other's true selves draws them closer than either ever expected, so close they can hardly be apart. When will this relationship finally become clear? Or are they destined to remain nothing more than "coworkers" forever?
foreign_title: ลูกพีชทานสด
